title: Big Fella
writer: Ingram D'Abbes, Claude McKay, Fenn Sherie
actors: Paul Robeson, Elisabeth Welch, Roy Emerton
plot: In this musical comedy, Paul Robeson stars as Joe, a Marseilles docker hired by a wealthy English couple to find their missing son. When Joe finds him, he learns he escaped of his own will, and takes him to stay with a local singe...
